name: outl
title: outl
description: Quick capture, search, and navigate your outl outliner from Raycast. Thin client over the outl CLI.
author: avelino

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.subtitle: outl
commands.description: Append a line to today's journal without leaving Raycast.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search
commands.subtitle: outl
commands.description: Search blocks and pages, then open the result in the outl app.

commands.name: open-today
commands.title: Open Today
commands.subtitle: outl
commands.description: Jump to today's journal in the outl app.

commands.name: new-page
commands.title: New Page
commands.subtitle: outl
commands.description: Create a new page and open it in the outl app.

preferences.name: workspace
preferences.title: Workspace Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your outl workspace (the folder that contains .outl/, journals/, pages/).

preferences.name: outlBin
preferences.title: outl Binary
preferences.description: Path to the outl binary. Leave as 'outl' if it is on Raycast's PATH; otherwise use an absolute path (e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/outl). Raycast often does not inherit your shell PATH.
